name: postman-runner
description: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that enables running Postman collections using Newman. This server allows LLMs to execute API tests and get detailed results through a standardized interface.

tools.name: run-collection
tools.description: Run a Postman Collection using Newman

collection.description: Path or URL to the Postman collection

environment.description: Optional path or URL to environment file

globals.description: Optional path or URL to globals file

iterationCount.description: Optional number of iterations to run
